creator: phealy@mvc.ie
text:
The kernel does not recognise an NEC 4XI cdrom drive sitting off a 1742. 
It does pick up a DEC scsi drive and HP DAT. The 1742 runs in extended 
mode and correctly sees all 3 devices according to its bootup message.
Tried with the generic kernel and a kernel built from BOOTMFS.

Fix: 

Nothing so far.
How-To-Repeat: 
reboot.
